welcome.title: Track resource sectors and unlock the craft console
welcome.description: ERZ routes, danger fields, and crafting corridors are ready. The full recipe tree, raw-material control, and command tools unlock once you sign in.
welcome.panelTitle: Craft control opens only after authentication
welcome.panelDescription: Once you sign in, the full recipe tree, material totals, detail screens, and command chat become available.
welcome.featureRouteDescription: See which sectors feed which resources and where the crafting chain starts slowing down.
welcome.featureForecastDescription: Estimate resources, timing, and categories for every item before you commit the run.
welcome.featureControlDescription: Keep chat, admin control, and fast crafting decisions inside one command surface.
welcome.lockedTitle: Console is armed, waiting for access
welcome.lockedDescription: As soon as you enter your account, the craft interface and full element index unlock immediately.

tree.title: Craft Tree
tree.rawNoRecipe: This is a raw material — no recipe

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.heroTitle: Run your crafting front with speed and control
login.heroDescription: Keep recipe chains, raw-material counts, and squad communication in one command surface so every next craft decision stays fast and precise.
login.cardDescription: Reconnect to your account and resume the crafting flow exactly where you left it.
login.featureTreeDescription: Read complex craft branches several steps ahead and spot production bottlenecks early.
login.featureMaterialsDescription: Track the resources and timing required for every craft with confident clarity.
login.featureChatDescription: Keep the base in rhythm with chat visibility and fast control actions.
login.invalidCredentialsDescription: The username or password did not match. Check your details and try again.
login.unavailableDescription: We could not finish the request right now. Please try again in a moment.

register.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
